title: 95% of AI Investments are FAILING!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

A bombshell MIT report, "The GenAI Divide," reveals a shocking truth: 95% of businesses are seeing ZERO return on their AI investments! The core problem isn't the tech; it's a "learning gap." Companies are failing because they treat advanced AI like basic software and don't adapt their workflows or culture. The successful 5% win by focusing on automating small, specific workflows and using "learning-capable" systems that adapt over time. Don't let your business fall into the 95% trap! What's your company doing differently?
